_notes: Canonical MCP server config for amaris-plugin. Edit only this file. Run scripts/render-mcp.py to regenerate .mcp.json / .gemini/settings.json / .codex/config.toml / .vscode/mcp.json.

stromy-format._notes: Hosted format skills (pptx, pptx-hd, docx, pdf, xlsx, mermaid, diagram, chart). Fetched at runtime via ReadMcpResourceTool — see skills/<name>/SKILL.md stubs. Per-user OAuth via Microsoft Entra ID (handled by mcp-remote browser flow on first use).
